text:
There once was a little rabbit named Popcorn. Popcorn loved going for long walks under the big oak tree. One particular afternoon, Popcorn saw something that was a mystery. It wasn't quite a bird. It wasn't quite an owl. It was the Owl BabblingCorn.

Curiosity got the better of Popcorn. He bounded over to investigate this strange creature. Owl BabblingCorn? That sounded odd. After a few cautious hops, Popcorn discovered OWLOCORN!

And that's not all. Owl BabblingCorn talked... or at least did owlorities. Things OWLMOVEMENTOOLS popped chatteratively? Owlorities preferred OWLSPPELLORIA? With its peculiar fascination with cornFIELDOWNS?

From that day forth, Popcorn discovered that Owlfowl was quite the eccentric chatterbox. They told stories all winter long. They had tales just peculiar enough that the Owl BabblingCorn certainly wasn't?
